architecture.calendar_lifecycle_projection: CalendarDecisionService + CalendarOpportunityProjectionService canonical fields, semantic validation before persistence
architecture.run_finalization: RunFinalizationCoordinator validates semantics and persists artifacts before verified snapshot promotion
architecture.calendar_api_source: StrategyRowRepository only for normal strategy/daily/open-position APIs

architecture.snapshot_promotion: Required endpoint verification gates canonical snapshot promotion
architecture.calendar_quality_filter_scope: stable eligibility only; structure rejection belongs to declarative expiration enumeration and canonical rows
architecture.calendar_endpoint_reconciliation: split projection and endpoint reconciliation logs with StrategyRowRepository as source of truth
